tele.title: Greenwatch: Telecom pushes for net zero amid AI energy gluttony

Dish turns to Chapter 11
tele.snippet: Dish DBS, a unit that includes Dish Wireless, has voluntarily filed Chapter 11 cases under a prepackaged restructuring plan. Dish's satellite TV and Sling TV services will remain operational during the process.

tele.title: FCC sets vote on rules to auction 160MHz of upper C-band spectrum
tele.snippet: The FCC will vote July 22 on proposed rules to auction 160MHz of the upper C-band, including a provision to create a 440MHz 'super-band' that will harmonize spectrum in the lower C-band.

tele.title: Verizon, Arcadyan net router waivers; NTCA, ACA, USTelecom also want one
tele.snippet: The FCC granted Verizon and Arcadyan expedited waivers that provide some relief from the agency's ban on new, foreign-made routers. NTCA, ACA, USTelecom and Askey also want one.
